channel.title: Agentic Web on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic Web on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: .NET at Microsoft Build 2026: Must watch sessions
item.description:
Microsoft’s Build 2026 .NET post highlights sessions covering .NET 11, union types in C#, AI building blocks, the agentic web, and .NET MAUI. It is a session roundup rather than a product release note.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: commandline: Grounding at scale: Engineering the retrieval system for the agentic web
item.description:
Microsoft introduced Web IQ, a new grounding system for the agentic web. The note is brief and does not include implementation details or feature specifics.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog
